name: vmetrix
description: VMetrix QA Automation Challenge - Playwright + TypeScript con POM y reportes Allure

scripts.test:report: rm -rf allure-results && playwright test && allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.test:ui:report: playwright test tests/ui && allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.report: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
